extensionName.description: The name of the extension as it appears in the browser store and toolbar.

extensionDescription.message: يجمّع علامات التبويب تلقائياً حسب النطاق.
extensionDescription.description: Short description shown in the extensions list.

popupTitle.description: Heading shown at the top of the popup/sidebar.

popupGroupTabs.description: Button that groups all open tabs immediately.

popupUngroupAll.description: Button that removes every tab group.

popupGenerateNewColors.description: Button that randomizes the colors of all groups.

popupGenerateNewColorsTitle.message: اختيار ألوان عشوائية للمجموعات. تُحفظ الألوان وتُستعاد تلقائياً لكل نطاق أو قاعدة.
popupGenerateNewColorsTitle.description: Tooltip for the Generate New Colors button.

settingsHeading.description: Heading for the main settings section.

settingLanguage.description: Label for the UI language picker.

settingLanguageAuto.description: Picker option that defers to the browser's UI language.

settingAutoGroupMode.description: Label for the toggle that enables automatic grouping.

settingGroupBy.description: Label for the group-by mode selector.

settingGroupByRulesOnly.description: Option that groups only by custom rules.

settingGroupByRulesAndDomain.description: Option that groups by rules plus base domain (popup).

settingGroupByRulesAndSubdomain.description: Option that groups by rules plus subdomain (popup).

settingGroupByDomain.description: Option that groups by base domain (sidebar).

settingGroupNewEmptyTabs.message: تجميع علامات التبويب الفارغة الجديدة تحت «System»
settingGroupNewEmptyTabs.description: Label for the toggle that groups blank/new tabs under a System group.

settingMinimumTabsForGroup.message: الحد الأدنى لعلامات التبويب لتكوين مجموعة
settingMinimumTabsForGroup.description: Label for the numeric input that sets the minimum tab count required to create a group.

settingAutoCollapseInactive.description: Label for the toggle that auto-collapses groups the user isn't looking at.

settingCollapseDelay.description: Label for the numeric input that sets the auto-collapse delay.

settingCollapseDelayHelp.message: 0 = فوري، أو حدّد التأخير (100-5000 مللي ثانية) قبل الطي
settingCollapseDelayHelp.description: Help text under the collapse-delay input.

settingOpenNewTabsNextToCurrent.message: فتح علامات التبويب الجديدة بجوار علامة التبويب الحالية
settingOpenNewTabsNextToCurrent.description: Label for the toggle that opens new tabs adjacent to the active tab.

settingPinnedTabsNote.message: لا تُجمَّع علامات التبويب المثبَّتة تلقائياً أبداً

sortingSectionTitle.description: Title for the collapsible sorting section.

settingSortGroupsAlphabetically.description: Toggle that keeps tab groups sorted alphabetically.

settingSortDirection.description: Label for the sort direction toggle (A-Z vs Z-A).

settingNumberGroups.description: Toggle that prefixes group titles with their sort index.

settingNumberGroupsHelp.message: يضيف أرقام المواضع إلى عناوين المجموعات للرجوع السريع
settingNumberGroupsHelp.description: Help text describing the Number Groups toggle.

aiSectionTitle.description: Title for the AI features section.

aiExperimentalBadge.description: Badge shown next to the AI Features title.

aiHelpTooltip.message: اقتراحات تجميع علامات التبويب المدعومة بالذكاء الاصطناعي. هذه الميزة تجريبية. تجري جميع المعالجة محلياً داخل متصفحك — لا تُرسَل أي بيانات إلى خوادم خارجية.

aiBadgeOn.description: Status badge shown when AI is enabled.

aiBadgeOff.description: Status badge shown when AI is disabled.

aiEnable.description: Toggle that enables or disables AI features.

aiModelLabel.description: Label for the AI model selector.

aiStatusLabel.description: Label for the AI model status.

aiStatusLoading.description: AI model status while loading, with a progress percentage.

aiLoadModel.description: Button that starts loading the AI model.

aiUnloadModel.description: Button that unloads the AI model.

aiLoadingButton.description: Label shown on the load button while loading.

aiRetryLoad.description: Button shown after an AI model load error.

aiWebGpuUnavailable.message: WebGPU غير متاح. تتطلب ميزات الذكاء الاصطناعي متصفحاً يدعم WebGPU.
aiWebGpuUnavailable.description: Warning shown when WebGPU is not supported.

aiDownloadNote.message: تعمل النماذج محلياً داخل متصفحك. يُنزِّل التحميل الأول النموذج (~250MB-900MB).
aiDownloadNote.description: Help text beneath the load model button.

aiSuggestGroups.description: Button that asks the AI to suggest tab groups.

aiAnalyzing.message: جارٍ تحليل علامات التبويب الخاصة بك...
aiAnalyzing.description: Status text while the AI analyzes open tabs.

aiNoSuggestions.description: Status text shown when the AI returns zero suggestions.

aiFailedToGetSuggestions.description: Error shown when AI suggestion fails.

aiApply.description: Button that applies an AI suggestion.

aiApplying.description: Button label while applying a suggestion.

aiApplied.description: Button label after applying a suggestion.

aiFailed.description: Button label after a suggestion fails.

aiCreateRule.description: Button that creates a rule from a suggestion.

aiTabsCount.description: Tab count label for a suggestion.

aiAppliedWithStale.description: Shown when a suggestion is applied but some tabs were closed.

aiFirefoxNotice.message: ميزات الذكاء الاصطناعي متاحة حالياً على Chrome فقط. دعم Firefox قريباً.

rulesSectionTitle.description: Title for the custom rules section.

rulesAddNewRule.description: Button that opens the new rule dialog.

rulesExport.description: Button that exports rules to JSON.

rulesImport.description: Button that imports rules from JSON.

rulesExportTitle.message: تصدير جميع القواعد إلى ملف JSON

rulesExportImportHelp.message: تصدير/استيراد القواعد كملفات JSON للنسخ الاحتياطي أو المشاركة
rulesExportImportHelp.description: Help text under the export/import buttons.

rulesEmptyState.message: لا توجد قواعد مخصَّصة بعد. أنشئ قاعدتك الأولى لتجميع علامات التبويب حسب تفضيلاتك!
rulesEmptyState.description: Shown when there are no custom rules.

rulesEdit.description: Edit button on a rule row.

rulesDelete.description: Delete button on a rule row.

rulesAddTabTitle.message: إضافة علامة التبويب إلى قاعدة موجودة
rulesAddTabTitle.description: Tooltip for the + button that adds the current tab to a rule.

rulesDeleteConfirm.message: هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد حذف القاعدة «$name$»؟
rulesDeleteConfirm.description: Confirmation prompt before deleting a rule.

rulesFailedToDelete.description: Error when deleting a rule fails.

rulesImportSummary.message:
نجح الاستيراد!
تم الاستيراد: $imported$ قاعدة
تم التخطي: $skipped$ قاعدة
rulesImportSummary.description: Summary shown after rules are imported.

rulesImportReplacePrompt.message:
هل تريد استبدال جميع القواعد الموجودة؟

اضغط «موافق» لاستبدال جميع القواعد الموجودة بالقواعد المستوردة
اضغط «إلغاء» لدمج القواعد المستوردة مع القواعد الموجودة
rulesImportReplacePrompt.description: Prompt that asks whether to merge or replace on import.

rulesNoExport.description: Tooltip shown on a disabled export button when there are no rules.

rulesNoDomains.description: Shown when a rule has no configured domains.

rulesAddTabNoTab.message: لم يتم العثور على علامة تبويب نشطة
rulesAddTabNoTab.description: Tooltip shown on the add-tab button when no active tab is available.

rulesAddTabCantExtract.message: لا يمكن استخراج النطاق من علامة التبويب هذه
rulesAddTabCantExtract.description: Tooltip when the current tab's URL has no domain.

rulesAddTabAlreadyExists.message: النطاق موجود بالفعل في هذه القاعدة
rulesAddTabAlreadyExists.description: Tooltip when the tab's domain is already part of the rule.

rulesAddTabAdded.description: Tooltip shown briefly after adding a tab to a rule.

rulesAddTabFailed.description: Tooltip when adding a domain fails.

blacklistAddButton.description: Button to add a domain to the blacklist.

blacklistHelp.message: لن يتم تجميع النطاقات الموجودة في القائمة السوداء أبداً
blacklistHelp.description: Help text under the blacklist section.

blacklistEmpty.message: لا توجد نطاقات في القائمة السوداء بعد.
blacklistEmpty.description: Shown when the blacklist is empty.

blacklistEditTitle.description: Tooltip for the blacklist edit button.

blacklistDeleteTitle.description: Tooltip for the blacklist delete button.

advancedSectionTitle.description: Title for the advanced settings section.

advancedHideContextMenu.description: Toggle that hides the extension's context menu items.

advancedHideContextMenuHelp.message: عند التفعيل، لن يُضيف Auto Tab Groups عناصره إلى قائمة النقر بالزر الأيمن للصفحة.
advancedHideContextMenuHelp.description: Help text for the hide context menu toggle.

footerMadeBy.description: Prefix for the author attribution in the footer.

footerFor.description: Connector text: 'Made by X, for Chrome'.

footerBrowserChrome.description: Name of the Chrome browser in the footer.

footerBrowserFirefox.description: Name of the Firefox browser in the footer.

contextMenuCreateRuleFromGroup.description: Right-click menu: create a custom rule from the clicked tab's group.

contextMenuAddTabToExistingRule.message: إضافة علامة التبويب إلى قاعدة موجودة
contextMenuAddTabToExistingRule.description: Right-click menu: submenu to add the current tab's domain to an existing rule.

contextMenuAddToBlacklist.description: Right-click menu: add the current tab's domain to the blacklist.

contextMenuNoRulesYet.description: Disabled placeholder shown when the Add Tab submenu has no rules.

ruleModalCreateTitle.description: Title shown when creating a new rule.

ruleModalEditTitle.description: Title shown when editing an existing rule.

ruleModalNameLabel.description: Label for the rule name input.

ruleModalNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the rule name input.

ruleModalNameHelp.message: يدعم أي لغة بما في ذلك الصينية واليابانية والكورية والرموز التعبيرية
ruleModalNameHelp.description: Help text under the rule name input.

ruleModalAiAssistLabel.description: Label for the AI assist section.

ruleModalAiAssistPlaceholder.message: صِف قاعدتك، مثلاً: «جمِّع كل خدمات Google» أو «جمِّع علامات التبويب الخاصة بـ AWS console»
ruleModalAiAssistPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the AI assist input.

ruleModalAiGenerate.description: Button that asks the AI to generate a rule.

ruleModalAiAssistHelp.message: صِف ما تريد تجميعه وسيقترح الذكاء الاصطناعي الاسم والنطاقات واللون
ruleModalAiAssistHelp.description: Help text under the AI assist input.

ruleModalPatternModeLabel.description: Label for the pattern mode toggle.

ruleModalPatternModeSimple.description: Simple pattern mode: matches whole domains.

ruleModalPatternModeExplicit.description: Explicit pattern mode: matches full URLs.

ruleModalSimpleModeHint.message: يجمّع جميع الصفحات من هذه النطاقات الأساسية
ruleModalSimpleModeHint.description: Hint shown in simple pattern mode.

ruleModalExplicitModeHint.message: يجمّع فقط الصفحات التي تطابق هذه الأنماط الكاملة للروابط
ruleModalExplicitModeHint.description: Hint shown in explicit pattern mode.

ruleModalPatternsHelp.message: يدعم: النطاقات، الرموز البدل (*.example.com)، المسارات (example.com/api/*)، عناوين IP
ruleModalPatternsHelp.description: Help text for the patterns textarea.

ruleModalEnabledLabel.description: Checkbox: whether the rule is enabled.

ruleModalSave.description: Submit button for the rule form.

ruleModalUpdate.description: Submit button when editing an existing rule.

ruleModalCancel.description: Cancel button for the rule form.

ruleModalConflictTitle.description: Heading of the conflict warning box.

ruleModalConflictSubtitle.message: تتداخل هذه الأنماط مع قواعد موجودة. ستُخصَّص علامات التبويب التي تطابق القاعدتين لواحدة فقط.

ruleModalAiSuggestions.description: Heading for the AI-generated resolution suggestions.

ruleModalSaveAnyway.description: Button that saves the rule despite conflicts.

ruleModalGoBack.description: Button that returns to editing after a conflict warning.

ruleModalChecking.description: Label shown on the save button while checking for conflicts.

ruleModalGenerating.description: Label shown on the AI generate button while generating a rule.

ruleModalAiThinking.description: Status text while the AI generates a rule.

ruleModalAiNeedsModel.message: حمّل نموذج ذكاء اصطناعي من قسم ميزات الذكاء الاصطناعي في النافذة المنبثقة لاستخدام المساعدة بالذكاء الاصطناعي
ruleModalAiNeedsModel.description: Status shown when AI Assist is invoked but no model is loaded.

ruleModalAiGenerated.message: تم إنشاء القاعدة! راجعها وعدّلها أدناه ثم احفظ.
ruleModalAiGenerated.description: Status after the AI generates a rule.

ruleModalAiGenerateError.message: فشل إنشاء القاعدة. حاول إعادة صياغة وصفك.
ruleModalAiGenerateError.description: Error shown when AI rule generation fails.

ruleModalAiEnterDescription.description: Error shown when AI Assist is triggered with no description.

ruleModalEnterPattern.message: يرجى إدخال نمط رابط واحد على الأقل
ruleModalEnterPattern.description: Alert shown when submitting with no patterns.

ruleModalEnterName.description: Alert shown when submitting a rule with no name.

ruleModalFailedToLoad.description: Alert when the rule modal can't load the rule.

ruleModalFailedToSave.description: Alert when saving a rule fails.

importPageTitle.description: Title for the import rules page.

importDropInstruction.description: Instruction shown in the import drop zone.

importBrowseFiles.description: Button that opens the file picker.

importModeLabel.description: Label above the import mode radio buttons.

importCancel.description: Cancel button on the import page.

importStatValid.description: Label for the valid rule count in the import preview.

importStatInvalid.description: Label for the invalid rule count in the import preview.

importPatternsSuffix.description: Label showing pattern count for an imported rule.

importMoreRules.description: Shown when more rules exist beyond the preview slice.

importUnnamed.description: Placeholder name for rules with no name.

importImporting.description: Label on the import button while importing.

importSuccessWithSkipped.description: Success message when some rules are skipped.

importInvalidJson.description: Error when file is not valid JSON.

importInvalidFormat.message: تنسيق الملف غير صالح: خاصية «rules» مفقودة
importInvalidFormat.description: Error when file has no 'rules' key.

importNoRules.message: لم يتم العثور على قواعد في الملف
importNoRules.description: Error when file has no rules.

importSelectJson.description: Error when a non-JSON file is selected.
